Sword of Pain  
 

No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50
Effect: Grim Aura (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Sword of Pain
No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50
Effect: Grim Aura (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Azaar
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 08:19:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Gregendek Icepaw


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded November 3rd, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Name of AA's Granted
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2022 at 9:10 PM Rating: Excellent
Venril
Guru
134 posts
When clicked, this item removes the AA "Item: Firefist" 0/3 from the Special tab and replaces it with the following AAs:

"Item: Aura of Rage" 2/3
"Item: Disable Item Abilities 1/1

If you make a hotkey for the latter, it reads "Disable Effects". Clicking it removes the Item: Aura of Rage 2/3 and replaces it with the Item: Firefist 0/3 again.

This is on the Yelinak server. Looks like this is different than what was on Phinigel back in 2017.

37 spawns today, only 3 named and 3 drops of the book.

QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2005 at 11:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591861883802
Scholar
157 posts
just go to top dogs and drop in the hole right before it, watch out for the dispelling trap. I think some of the dogs DO see invise

This is fun to play with while running..
Also there is a godly dmg 1h that has sweet gemed and gold hilt on second lvl of hate unless that was changed. I saw one rot by accident cause it was in a wall.

nerf?
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2003 at 10:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255182124
10 posts
did they nerf this,,, why no post since june,,, any body read these anymore?
▲ Page top
RE: nerf?
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2004 at 2:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795128798
Scholar
60 posts
Nope, not nerfed. A friend just linked one that dropped. Still exactly the same as in the picture.

The effect is the same as the highly coveted Shrunken Goblin Skull Earring. The effect is wanted because it's an instant cast and can be used as a junk buff against dispelling mobs, not because of what the effect actually does (although an extra 10 ATK is never bad).
▲ Page top
RE: nerf?
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2003 at 5:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756055432
345 posts
People have just been concentrating on PoP & the new Ykeshan zones so that they have overlooked the older zones and the decent drops. This sword isn't too bad, wish there was a better aura click to it, but it would take away that spell slot at least.

Renmazuo Skoaldiak {Tallon Zek}

Edited, Mon Mar 31 17:22:44 2003
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 10 2002 at 5:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hahahahaha, i'm lvl 10 and i got one of these... I was on my 60 bard and was grouped in US when a friend shouted out Sword of Pain on corpse in LS. Well my 10 necro was docked in NRO so I told him to save it for me, got on my 10sk and low and behold INSTA PORT a 52 druid right on me as i zoned in. He was right there! Damn talk about destiny. :P LOl wahtever, anyway..So..I go and I get a port to GD, sow ac/hp buff and invis and run into velks, down into LD and LOOT IT AND GRIM AURA WORKS ON LVL 10 :P WOOOOOOOOOOO BABY!
10 int

QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 5:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777648217
100 posts
I this is a really nice sk weapon . Instead of goin to velks I would go to chardok to obtain the shard of night. Shard of night is 21/24 plus some nice stats. Shard of night is also sellable so if you get tired of it you can always go to bazaar and sell the thing.If you are high enough level to fight velks you should be able to get a grp in chardok.

MoSS = 19/29 1hb +10int, SoP = 19/25 +50mana +10ac + Grim Aura (and im lvl21 so i dont have Grim aura yet :P so ill get this sword instead... ill get the aura if it doesnt click right away)

Great Weap
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2002 at 9:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253045047
5 posts
I just got this tonight, was messing around in GD and a 55 rogue told me that this had dropped in Velks, went in there and eventually someone showed me the way. Was using Strength of Grodan beforehand, and will probably still use if im going solely for dmg. Otherwise, this sword is almost same ratio with the AC plus I can use a shield. All in all it rocks, plus it looks great.

- Necis Umbra 50 Ogre Sk
▲ Page top
getting to the place
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2002 at 2:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764185366
24 posts
From the zone of velk. how do you get to the place where this drops? Is it hard to get there? and can anything see invis on the way there? thanks
▲ Page top
RE: getting to the place
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 10:32 AM Rating: Decent
Drakang
View User Forum
Scholar
252 posts
Nothing sees invis. You have to go up the ramps until there is a tunnel ahead of you that turns to the right(eyes camp). You go ot the end of the tunnel and through the fake wall. You drop down into the big hole and then drop down into the hole in the middle again. You are now in the lower dogs area. There are mobs that spawn here and a trap that dispells all buffs so need to make sure somebody has cleared this spot if going down alone.
____________________________
The Power of Hate conquers all foes.
Leader of The Silent Minority a Rathe Guild
▲ Page top
RE: getting to the place
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2003 at 8:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752388758
View User Forum
44 posts
Correction!
Spiders with the word "Hunter" in their name DO see invis.

# Apr 17 2002 at 9:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253154232
13 posts
Sure am, let me break it down for you.
Blood ember helm 21 AC
Blood ember BP 40 AC
Blood runed greaves 39 AC
Blood runed gauntlets 26 AC
guardian pauldrons 14 AC
guardian choker 10 AC
Blood ember boots 21 AC
Vah Shir claw earrings X2 10 AC
Velium Fire wedding rings X2 12 AC
Orb of the Infinite void 35 AC
Mask of the Wurms 5 AC
Silvery Belt of Contention 10 AC
Black Bear pelt cloak (kael item) 11 AC
more stuff to list but I forget ;)

Just Got Mine!!
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2001 at 3:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758361700
View User Forum
103 posts
Man is this sword a nice upgrade from my MoSS!! The Grim Aura effect is right clickable also! what a plus!
Just to let all of you know I am level 48 Iksar sk and have never been to Velk's Tome before...what I did is went inside stayed at zone and waited for someone to camp the LD (lower dogs) I then payed a player 500PP to get me down there to the grp and just stayed invis the whole way...(only named dogs can see thru invis) They killed it I looted it and now im 2K richer for selling my sk and have an uber sword!!! Good luck all!!
▲ Page top

__DEL__1593966139779
5 posts
whenever i read such posts i wish they put level requirements on items (like on those armor pieces from Akheva). where's the risk vs. reward in that guy's story?

Edited, Fri Dec 28 07:38:16 2001
▲ Page top
RE: Just Got Mine!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 5:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251591947
2 posts
Shut up, that guy is a level 54 IKSAR shadow knight, he earned it.
▲ Page top
RE: Just Got Mine!!
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2002 at 9:28 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758520025
Scholar
25 posts
Normally I wouldn't applaud such behavior either, but since I'm probably going to do the same for my Shadowknight, I guess this is as much a justification for you as it is for me as well.

From the beginning we knew that this was a role-playing game. Shadowknights' are know for their honor in battle, but they are underhanded none the less. I figure why not be a rich Sk who gets what he wants one way or another. And if someone says 'No' (Verant in this case w/ the No Drop tag and you w/ the recommended level comment) you just have to take matters into your own hands. That and when it comes to material wealth, there are no boundries.

Atleast that's how I play my SK. A cocky, self-made millionare(well, close enough =Þ) who does what it takes. But he still has honor on the battlefield. One to be trusted as a friend, and hated as an enemy.

Hope that helped, it helped ME out a great deal, hehe.

Phryyte Shadowbeast
Cockiest brother from Paineel.
36 Erudite Shadowknight

# Sep 10 2002 at 6:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754040293
42 posts
Drops in the pit. go thru the false wall at the end of safe hall and drop all the way down. Problem is, you need a port to get out of there. Ahhhh, the 124th reason why a melee should carry a thrug port potion AT ALL TIMES. heh

Very nice
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2001 at 10:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361502638
9 posts
This sword is extremely nice. Like a Shrunken Goblin Earring that swings =). I just got it not too long ago, it is currently replacing my Darkmetal Falchion, and its doing an extremely good job. The look may be tacky, but who cares for looks, I can hit in 80's with it and it is 25 dly. My Atk is 941 when I use grim aura, and it is great for debuffin mobs.

▲ Page top
Great sword !!!
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248553665
5 posts
Just got this nice piece last knight. I was only SK in the group at the time so it was mine. This sword is Great i was using a MOSS but gave it to guild when i got this one. Little dissapointed int the look considering it looks like Dark Reaver but who cares peeps will know it's not when they see u with a shield. Mob was very tough, we had two warriors over 54 and a 57cleric healing with a 56 mage blasing away and of course thank god for the chanter holding off all the other meanies. Anyways he was a tough one to kill took us a good 5 min to drop him. All in all though i would have to say this sword is the ****. )

Rastos Ravenwind
51 Reaver
Ayonea Ro

QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 1:55 PM Rating: Decent

3 posts
I am gonna try and camp it all day today this weapon is sick. Click grim which saves a spell slot plus the ratio is nice , i tried 8 times to get noct i am not about to buy it i will just get this with some friends.

JoltX Shadowspirit

Mith Marr
▲ Page top
Better than Ebon/Noc
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2001 at 3:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246303646
13 posts
As a Dark Elf, this is simply one of the best one hand weapon in the game. AC and Damage/Delay is King. Only other thing Ive seen on my serve rthats Better is the Black RockMaul of Crushing. Which is a Temple of Veeshan server.

However, this weapon PISSES me off. So easily obtainable. I've seen a Level 10 SK with this weapon. It made the price of the Noc come down from 20k to 13k on the Innoruuk server. What the hell was Verant thinking?

Another cool thing about it is that Paladins get the shaft again, heh. You can buy MoSS for 1k. Noc for 13k, but the SoM is like 20 - 25k. The Mace of the Shadowed Soul is the reason why ShadowKnights are better than any Paladin. (Dont make any dumb comments, just my opinion. Sure, a Paladin with SoM might be able to beat a SK with a MoSS)

Go there with your main, and camp you SK at the entrance so when one drops you can get it. And be cool =)
Like me =)
▲ Page top
RE: Better than Ebon/Noc
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 6:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361642221
View User Forum
11 posts
Actually, paladins don't get screwed one this one. A named mob in the same camp, Jelinek Icepaw, drops the Sword of Blessings, same stats, except I believe the effect is one that cures disease/poison.

Edited, Thu Jan 10 18:51:28 2002
▲ Page top
Better than a noct..
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 11:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763138120
8 posts
I can't believe what I'm hearing.... this sword beats the living **** out of a Noctivagant blade! It has 1 more damage 1 LESS delay, 10 AC (and its still 1 hand slash) AND 50 mana to compensate for the missing int... and what moron wouldn't trade 10 dex for 10ac? Trust me, I have a noct and would use this over it any day!
